lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear on the interior and exterior and requires mechanical attention. It is not in reliable running order.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle! It is in mint condition, meticulously kept and appearing virtually brand new both inside and out. From its flawless paint to its pristine interior, this car offers a truly premium driving experience for its next owner.
The vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and well-maintained. The interior and exterior show minor signs of use but are generally well-preserved.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to return to a reliable state. The exterior has significant rust on the wheel arches, several large dents, and the clear coat is peeling across the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears, and the electronics are inconsistent. This is a project car suited for someone looking for a parts vehicle or a major restoration.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom condition. It has been meticulously cared for and kept in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint is entirely original and flawless, without a single scratch or chip. Inside, the leather remains supple and like-new, with all electronic components functioning perfectly. Mechanically, it is sound, with a full service history documenting its preventative maintenance. Truly a collector-quality example for a discerning buyer.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the strategic buyer. Maintained to rigorous standards, the automobile exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved interior. Every system has been verified for operational excellence, ensuring a seamless transition to its next owner. This offering combines sophisticated engineering with an accessible price point, epitomizing a sound investment in quality transportation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it has been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and fun weekend getaways. You'll love how smooth it feels on the road—it's definitely ready for its next big adventure! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself; I'm sure you'll fall in love with it just like I did!

This 996.2 Carrera represents a high-water mark for the analog driving experience, featuring the 3.6L M96 flat-six engine with VarioCam Plus for an optimized torque curve and 315 hp. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a G96 6-speed manual transaxle, offering precise gates and mechanical engagement. The chassis remains composed, utilizing a multi-link rear suspension and McPherson struts that provide exceptional turn-in and communicative steering feel. Braking is handled by four-piston monobloc calipers over vented rotors, showing excellent bite and thermal stability. This example has been proactively maintained with a documented IMS bearing retrofit and RMS replacement. While the finish shows light road patina, the mechanical vitals are robust, with healthy compression across all cylinders and a dry undercarriage. A driver-focused specimen with sorted internals and classic flat-six acoustics.
Reliable used car. Good mechanical condition. Clean interior. Title in hand. Priced for quick sale.

Up for sale is a remarkably well-maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior paint maintains a deep, mirror-like finish, with only minor stone chips consistent with light highway use. Step inside to a cabin that has been kept in wonderful condition; the premium upholstery is clean and free of tears, showing only gentle softening that comes with careful ownership. Every electronic component, including the dual-zone climate control and the premium sound system, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and delivers smooth, consistent power, backed by a comprehensive service history. We have recently performed a multi-point inspection, updated the fluids, and confirmed the suspension provides a tight, responsive ride. This car has been a smoke-free, pet-free sanctuary and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately. It represents a fantastic opportunity to own a high-

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated balance of refinement and utility, it serves as an exemplary choice for those seeking a high-caliber driving experience.

This exceptionally maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presence, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and performance. A superior acquisition for those who demand reliability and sophistication.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in great shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone looking for a solid, well-cared-for car without the brand-new price tag. It handles beautifully and is totally ready to hit the road for its next adventure! Come take it for a spin, I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have!
This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six
Used car. Good condition. Reliable performance. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular service history.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior features a lustrous metallic finish that has been regularly detailed; while it shows minor, expected signs of road use like small stone chips on the front fascia, the body remains straight and free of major blemishes. Inside, the premium cabin remains a comfortable sanctuary; the leather upholstery is supple and clean, with only light softening on the driver’s side bolster from normal use. All onboard technology, including the high-fidelity sound system and navigation, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with recent service records available. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a composed ride. It is a solid, honest car that has been cared for with pride, offering a premium driving experience without the 'new car' price tag.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile offers a superior driving experience and represents a refined choice for the discerning buyer. Its condition reflects a history of attentive care, ensuring long-term value and performance.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile offers a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Its well-preserved condition ensures a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been super well-cared for? I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and honestly, it’s in great shape! It runs like a dream and is ready for all your upcoming adventures. I’ve truly loved driving this beauty, and I know you will too. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable daily driver. Title in hand.

Experience the perfect balance of performance and reliability with this meticulously maintained vehicle. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor, honest signs of road use expected of a well-loved car. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin where the premium upholstery remains supple and the dashboard electronics function exactly as they did on day one. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; it has followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule, resulting in a smooth, responsive drive and a whisper-quiet engine. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a complete package for a discerning buyer looking for a turn-key vehicle that looks as good as it performs.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and has been preserved with care, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. Its condition reflects a commitment to quality maintenance, making it a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking value without compromise.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. It exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved interior, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. Rigorously inspected to meet our professional standards, this model offers exceptional performance and longevity at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been loved and well-cared for? This beauty is in great shape and absolutely ready for its next adventure! It runs super smoothly and is perfect for weekend road trips or just zipping around town. You’re going to love how it handles—it’s a total gem! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sorted driver’s car featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been enhanced with documented rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, ensuring the structural rigidity necessary for spirited cornering. Recent service includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement, addressing the critical preventative maintenance for this platform. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the mechanical components remain robust and track-ready, offering a visceral analog driving experience with a linear 8,000 RPM powerband.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes an excellent balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish, showing only the minor, superficial stone chips one would expect from careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with the upholstery and trim remaining firm and well-preserved. All electronic systems, including the dual-zone climate control and premium audio interface, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; the engine delivers smooth, consistent power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly through every gear. Recent service records confirm that all scheduled maintenance is up to date, and the tires have ample tread remaining. It offers a quiet, composed ride that feels tight and responsive on the road. This is a reliable, turn-key car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained to ensure mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking consistent quality and exceptional value.
